results.rendered_html:
1. at , atati, atitā, atiṣyati, ātīt beständig gehen  DHĀTUP. 3,1 . atati = gatikarma  NAIGH. 2,14 . wandern, laufen: sā no viśvā ati dviṣaḥ svasṝranyā ṛtāvarī . atannaheva sūryaḥ ..  ṚV. 6,61,9 . med.: arīramadatamānaṃ cidetoḥ 2,38,3 . samare 'tamānāḥ 6,9,2 .
— Vgl. aṭ.
— abhi besuchen, einkehren: atithirabhyatito gṛhānbhavati  NIR. 4,5 .
— ava hinabgehen: avātita  NIR. 10,13 .
— sam besuchen: samatasi kapota iva garbhadhim  ṚV. 1,30,4 .

results.rendered_html:
at 1 P. (ati), atati, atituṃ, atta-atita
1 To go, walk; wander, to go constantly.
2 To obtain (mostly Ved.)
3 To bind.
4 (aṃtati) To bind.
